seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: goal+input: generalize weighted Max-SAT clauses to weighted CARDINALITY (threshold) constraints -- a 'reservoir balance zone' is cleared iff at least t_j of its k_j signed literals hold, not just one; skinned as geothermal well injection/production mode selection. Objective stays maximize total cleared weight, but threshold clauses make a single flip rarely decisive (real local-search structure), and the all-production baseline is the checker reference B.
title: Geothermal Field Balancing: Well Mode Selection under Zone Quorums
strategies: all-production constant assignment (reproduces the checker baseline B, Ratio=0.1)
single-pass greedy: for each well pick the mode with positive incremental cleared weight
iterated hill-climbing to a local optimum via threshold-crossing weight-improving flips
multi-restart local search (all-production / all-injection / random seeds), keep best
weight-aware / quorum-aware ordering that prioritizes heavy high-enthalpy zones near their threshold
